description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New

New Chat now supports starting a DM with another Matrix user

Added hover cards to members in Chat Info

Fixed & Improved

Fixed crashing when some Linux users opened certain chats

Improved reliability for connecting an account

Starting a new chat is more reliable and shouldn't fail

Image captions won't be incorrectly formatted as rich text

Muted accounts now show correct unread counts
